paragraphs.craft: Aspiring AI/ML Engineer with a solid CS foundation and hands-on experience building and deploying ML models. Passionate about applying AI to real-world, scalable solutions.
paragraphs.learn: I love working across the stack — from RAG systems and LLMs to computer vision and full-stack web apps. Always picking up new ideas in AI, systems design, and engineering to build things that matter.
paragraphs.life: Outside of coding, I enjoy exploring new tech, tinkering with side projects, and finding creative ways to solve problems with software.

basics.name: Hardik Arora
basics.label: AI/ML Engineer
basics.summary: Aspiring AI/ML Engineer with a solid CS foundation and hands-on experience in building and deploying ML models. Passionate about applying AI to real-world, scalable solutions.

watermelon.name: Watermelon Software Inc.
watermelon.summary: Watermelon Software Inc. builds intelligent software solutions.

highlights.rag-system: Built a production-grade RAG system answering queries across 2,257 pages of documentation using hybrid retrieval (Vector + BM25 + RRF), powered by OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, Cohere reranking, and Groq LLMs — achieving 72% Precision@10 and 82% MRR.
highlights.slo-copilot: Built a Conversational SLO Copilot that analyzes service health, alerts, and incidents to answer reliability queries in natural language, enabling engineers to diagnose issues faster and monitor SLO/SLA compliance.

materiallab.name: Material Lab
materiallab.summary: Material Lab is a product studio building AI-powered web applications and client platforms.

highlights.hendrix: Engineered features for Hendrix, an AI-powered long-form to short-video generation platform, building audio transcription pipelines using OpenAI Whisper to convert long-form content into trailers, teasers, and social media reels.
highlights.gymbo: Built and shipped Gymbo, a white-label PWA punch tracker for gym trainers integrating Twilio authentication, OpenClaw APIs, and WhatsApp-assisted workflows.
highlights.landing-pages: Developed SEO-optimized frontend experiences using GSAP animations; implemented a Facebook GraphQL API + GitHub Actions pipeline to sync events to landing pages, and used Remotion to generate product demo videos programmatically.

yantrapragya.name: YantraPragya
yantrapragya.summary: YantraPragya builds AI solutions for healthcare and industrial automation.

highlights.pathology: Automated extraction of medical parameters (CBC, LFT, etc.) from PDFs using Python, Pandas, NLTK, and Regex, generating structured JSON and Excel outputs for downstream healthcare analytics.
highlights.dental: Developed a U-Net based deep learning model to detect gum infections and dental issues from clinical images using TensorFlow and OpenCV.
